title: collinsia rattanii var. linearis
intro: Collinsia rattanii var. linearis, also known as the linear-leaved blue-eyed Mary, is a variety of flowering plant in the plantain family, characterized by its blue to purple flowers and linear leaves. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Collinsia rattanii var. linearis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function, as well as its ability to act as an antispasmodic and calm the nervous system. Collinsia rattanii var. linearis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its dried flowers and leaves can be used in herbal remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
